name: The Birdhouse- Oceana
address: 2608 Horse Pasture Rd unit 102, Virginia Beach, VA 23453
about: The Birdhouse is a membership-based indoor golf practice and performance facility with two locations in Virginia Beach: Oceana and Bayville. The centers are fully equipped with Trackman technology, which is recognized as the industry's most accurate launch monitor and simulator system. Membership is required to access the facilities, with three distinct tiers offering varying levels of bay reservation hours, and is limited to approximately 100 members per location to ensure availability and quality of experience. The onboarding process includes a facility tour, software navigation instruction, and a PIN code for 24/7 member access, allowing for self-serve practice and play sessions between 5am and 11pm daily.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the industry-leading Trackman simulator technology for precise shot data and course play
Professional-grade practice environment with complimentary premium golf balls and extensive training aids
Significant discounts on private coaching, with lesson rates reduced from $150 to $80 for members

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service. Complimentary coffee and water available for members and guests.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead system installed at the Bayville location.
Standard system installed at the Oceana location.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs and balls?
faq.answer: No, the facility supplies Pro V1 golf balls, but members are welcome to use their own balls of choice. You will need to bring your own golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility offers complimentary waters and coffee to all members and their guests. There is no mention of a policy regarding outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes about 45 minutes for one player to complete a full 18-hole round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility does not specifically mention child-friendly features or policies. The nature of a serious training studio suggests it is geared towards focused practice rather than family entertainment.
